meta.title: Top Gun: Maverick Fighter Breakdown - A complete guide
meta.description:
On Tuesday, movie buffs and aviation nerds alike were treated to yet another (and this time final) trailer for the long — and I do mean long — awaited “Top Gun: Maverick.” The thrice-delayed premier is now set for May 27, 2022.

Here's a breakdown of all the fighters you'll see on screen throughout the new Top Gun, from Maverick's classic P-51 Mustang to the mysterious "Darkstar" aircraft—Alex Hollings runs through them all. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews

📱 Follow Alex Hollings on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexHollings52
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexhollingswrites
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AlexHollingsWrites

1st Trailer: https://youtu.be/qSqVVswa420
2nd Trailer: https://youtu.be/g4U4BQW9OEk
3rd Trailer: https://youtu.be/giXco2jaZ_4

Read the COMPLETE guide to fighters in Top Gun: Maverick:
https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-complete-guide-to-the-fighter-aircraft-in-top-gun-maverick/

Special thanks to Paramount Pictures for the use of clips from the original Top Gun, used under Fair Use as outlined by U.S. Copyright law.
